summary: Completed testing of Iteration 11 features: Quiz loading speed, TTS languages, Reading History APIs and UI. All backend tests pass (17/17). Frontend features working correctly after restart.

integration_issues.issue: Section was not visible initially, appeared after frontend (expo) restart - likely stale bundle cache

critical_code_review_comments: Quiz loading uses Promise.all for parallel fetching of topics and categories - working correctly
TTS implementation in bible.tsx uses robust voice selection with fallback chain
Reading history endpoints properly save chapters with read_count tracking
Profile page shows reading history with clickable entries to resume reading
seed_data_creation: Created reading history entries via API: Genesi 1, Giovanni 3, Salmi 23, Matteo 5
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 features verified working. Quiz loads in ~2-3s, TTS has 6 language support, Reading history saves and displays in Profile section. Backend APIs tested: /api/progress/reading/chapter, /api/progress/reading/history, /api/quiz/topics, /api/quiz/categories

quiz_loading_speed.details: Quiz page loads in ~2s, individual quiz starts in ~3s. Parallel loading implemented with Promise.all

quiz_categories_display.details: 33 thematic categories displayed with 1000 total questions, 3 tabs visible (Tematici, Classici, Avanzato)

quiz_question_display.details: Questions show correctly with 4 options (A, B, C, D) and progress counter (1/30)

tts_language_support.details: 6 languages supported: it-IT, es-ES, en-US, de-DE, fr-FR, pt-BR. Backend returns TTS codes correctly

bible_page_features.details: Language bar with 6 flags, edition selector, TTS button, font size control, help button all visible

reading_history_api.details: POST /api/progress/reading/chapter saves entries with read_count. GET /api/progress/reading/history returns sorted list

reading_history_ui.details: Cronologia Lettura section in Profile shows book name, chapter, read count, and last read date. Entries are clickable

app_fluidity.details: API response times: languages 0.1s, bible/books 0.1s, bible/chapter 0.1s, editions 0.1s
